questions.question: What single question does the verification gate answer?
questions.questionZh: 验证关卡 (Verification Gate) 需要回答的唯一问题是什么？
options: Is this task actually complete? (reading scope, rule, feedback, and diff artifacts)
optionsZh: 该任务是否已真正完成？（需查阅范围 (scope)、规则 (rule)、反馈 (feedback) 及差异产物 (diff artifacts)）
Token 预算 (Token Budget) 是否健康？
questions.explanation: The gate is a deterministic function over workbench artifacts producing a pass/fail verdict.
questions.explanationZh: 门控 (Gate) 是一个作用于工作台制品 (Workbench Artifacts) 的确定性函数 (Deterministic Function)，用于输出通过/失败判定 (Pass/Fail Verdict)。

questions.question: Why must the gate be deterministic?
questions.questionZh: 为什么门控（gate）必须是确定性的（deterministic）？
options: The same artifact set must produce the same verdict every time; LLM judges belong in the reviewer (qualitative), not the gate (status)
optionsZh: 相同的工件集（artifact set）每次都必须产生一致的判定结果（verdict）；LLM 评判器（LLM judges）应归属于评审环节（reviewer，定性），而非质量门禁（gate，状态）。
questions.explanation: Mixing model judgment into the gate collapses the deterministic/qualitative split.
questions.explanationZh: 将模型判断（model judgment）引入门控（gate）中，会打破确定性（deterministic）与定性（qualitative）之间的界限。

questions.question: What is the gate's override discipline?
questions.questionZh: 门控（gate）的覆盖规则（override discipline）是什么？
options: Block-severity findings can only be overridden by a human with a recorded override_reason and overridden_by user id in a signed audit log
optionsZh: 任何人都可以静默覆盖
阻断级发现项（Block-severity findings）仅允许人工进行覆盖（override），且必须在已签名审计日志（signed audit log）中记录 override_reason 与 overridden_by 用户 ID。
覆盖操作需提供经理邮箱
questions.explanation: Signed overrides land in outputs/verification/overrides.jsonl; agent cannot self-override.
questions.explanationZh: 签名覆盖（Signed overrides）将输出至 outputs/verification/overrides.jsonl；智能体（Agent）无法进行自我覆盖（Self-override）。

questions.question: What is the Hybrid Norm pairing the lesson cites?
questions.questionZh: 课程中引用的混合范数配对（Hybrid Norm pairing）是什么？
options: Verifiable rewards (tests, schemas, exit codes) answer 'did it solve the problem?'; LLM rubrics answer 'is it readable, secure, on-style?'
optionsZh: 可验证奖励（Verifiable Rewards）（如测试、模式、退出码）用于回答“它是否解决了问题？”；而 LLM 评估准则（LLM Rubrics）则用于回答“它是否可读、安全且符合风格要求？”
缓存 (Cache) 与 不缓存 (no-cache)
questions.explanation: Anthropic 2026 guidance: gate runs the first class; reviewer (Lesson 39) runs the second.
questions.explanationZh: Anthropic 2026年指南：门控（gate）负责运行第一类；审核器（reviewer）（第39课）负责运行第二类。

questions.question: How does defense-in-depth layer the gates?
questions.questionZh: 纵深防御（Defense-in-Depth）是如何分层部署安全门禁（Gates）的？
options: Pre-commit hook -> CI status check -> pre-tool authz hook -> pre-merge gate; each layer is deterministic so failure in one is caught by the next
optionsZh: 预提交钩子 (Pre-commit hook) -> CI 状态检查 (CI status check) -> 预工具授权钩子 (pre-tool authz hook) -> 预合并门禁 (pre-merge gate)；每一层均具备确定性 (deterministic)，因此任一层的失败都会被下一层捕获。
questions.explanation: Multiple non-bypassable layers catch what a single layer would miss.
questions.explanationZh: 多个不可绕过层（non-bypassable layers）能够捕获单个层级可能遗漏的内容。

questions.question: What does a coverage_floor check protect against?
questions.questionZh: 覆盖率下限（coverage_floor）检查旨在防范什么问题？
options: Agents quietly deleting tests that fail; the gate fails if measured coverage drops below the floor or last merge by more than 1 percentage point
optionsZh: 智能体（Agents）静默删除失败的测试用例；若实测代码覆盖率（Code Coverage）较预设底线（Floor）或上次合并时下降超过 1 个百分点，则质量门禁（Quality Gate）将判定失败。
questions.explanation: Without a floor, agents can silently lower coverage to keep the verdict green.
questions.explanationZh: 若未设置最低阈值（floor），智能体（agent）可能会暗中降低覆盖率（coverage），以维持判定结果（verdict）为绿色（green）。

questions.question: When should --strict mode promote every warn to block?
questions.questionZh: `--strict` 模式应在何时将每个警告（warn）升级为阻断（block）？
options: Release branches, ship-blocking PRs, post-incident triage; not the daily default because strict-on-everything corrodes flow
optionsZh: 发布分支（Release branches）、阻塞发布的 PR（Pull Requests）、事后故障排查（Post-incident triage）；不应作为日常默认流程，因为事事严格会侵蚀工作流（Flow）。
questions.explanation: --strict is opt-in by branch; reserve for high-stakes moments.
questions.explanationZh: `--strict` 按分支显式启用（opt-in）；保留用于关键场景。
